task_title: Bug — zerodha.NewProvider requires live token even when all candle data is cached

priya_plan.plan_summary: Bugfix path: instruments CSV caching + chunk completeness validation in pkg/provider/zerodha/
priya_plan.approach: Collapsed bugfix plan: add InstrumentsCacheDir to Config, add loadOrCacheInstrumentsCSV, add ErrIncompleteData typed error, wire completeness check into FetchCandles, update cmdutil.BuildProvider.

build.build_summary: Bugfix: zerodha.NewProvider now accepts InstrumentsCacheDir in Config. When set and the cached instruments.csv is <24h old, the Kite network call is skipped entirely — no token required. Stale or absent cache falls through to a network fetch that writes the result to disk. FetchCandles now validates chunk completeness after merge: returns *ErrIncompleteData if candle count < 90% of weekday estimate. cmdutil.BuildProvider wired to pass cacheDir as InstrumentsCacheDir so all cmd/ binaries benefit immediately.

decision_marks_pending: **Decision (instruments CSV cache path) — architecture: experimental** — cached instruments.csv lives in {cacheDir}/instruments.csv (same dir as candle cache); caller controls path via InstrumentsCacheDir Config field

**Decision (InstrumentsCacheDir as explicit Config field) — architecture: experimental** — optional field preserves backward compatibility; empty = original uncached behavior; non-empty = cache-aware path

**Decision (completeness threshold 90%) — tradeoff: experimental** — 90% floor (revised from initial 95%) absorbs NSE holiday gap vs weekday estimate without masking real data gaps; user confirmed 90% post-build
